title: satureja obovata subsp. hispalensis
intro: Satureja obovata subsp. hispalensis, a lesser-known species of the satureja plant family, is a perennial herb native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high concentration of antioxidants and essential oils, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Satureja obovata subsp. hispalensis include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and support the immune system. It is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and essential oil blends, and can be consumed as a dietary supplement after consulting with a healthcare professional.
